meaning: n.[化]利谷隆(一种选择性除草剂)
examples: The objective is to explore reproductive toxicity and mechanism of linuron on F1 male rats.
Objective:To explore reproductive toxicity and mechanism of linuron on F1 male rats.
From the organic carbon adsorption constant, linuron had middling transference, diuron and monuron had upper transference, and these showed that they had worse transference in the soil.
